title: dubautia sherffiana var. paucinervia
intro: Dubautia sherffiana var. paucinervia is a rare and endangered variety of the Dubautia plant, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, native to Hawaii. Dubautia sherffiana var. paucinervia has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine, with its leaves and stems possessing medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Dubautia sherffiana var. paucinervia can be used in teas, infusions, and salves, although its availability is highly limited due to its endangered status.
